title: Ashen + Inmis Support
description: A small, 16x pack adding compatibility between Ashen 16x and Inmis
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

Want to play Ashen with [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis)? Tired of how bright Inmis' default backpack sprites look when paired with Ashen? Then this Add-On is for you!

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___

This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen/) and [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis).
___

[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)
